import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
let s = match line
when Some(t)
  t
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
mut product = 1
mut i = 0
let n = parts.len()
while i < n
  let tok = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    1
  end
  product = product * v
  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
